subcodes.first_line: Blessed is he who hath confined all matters to the remembrance of his Lord and hath attained unto this sealed wine. Verily, He Who ordaineth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لمن اقتصر الامور علی ذکر مولیه و فاز بهذا الرحیق المختوم ان الذی امر
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @wisdom [hikmat], @praise and encouragement, @contention and conflict, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
